---
title: Lab solutions
---

Lab worksheets with answers included.

- [Lab 02 -- Statistical programming](labs/Lab02.qmd)
- [Lab 03 -- Exploring and visualising data](labs/Lab03.qmd)
- [Lab 04 -- Central limit theorem](labs/Lab04.qmd)
- [Lab 05 -- Hypothesis testing](labs/Lab05.qmd)
- [Lab 06 -- Two-sample *t*-test](labs/Lab06.qmd)
- [Lab 07 -- Non-parametric tests & Chi-squared tests](labs/Lab07.qmd)
- [Lab 09 -- Describing relationships](labs/Lab09.qmd)
- [Lab 10 -- Linear functions](labs/Lab10.qmd)
- [Lab 11 -- Multiple Linear Regression](labs/Lab11.qmd)
- [Lab 12 -- Non-linear models](labs/Lab12.qmd)
